html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D2.DT.Meningococcal.MenA conjugate vaccine 1 dose decision table in the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination
Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination Guidance
Client is due for meningococcal vaccination
Client is due for meningococcal vaccination Guidance
Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete Guidance
